title: Find Words Starting with B
description: Import the re module. Use re.findall() to find all words that start with the letter **b** in the string: **'apple bear banana cherry blueberry date'**. Use the pattern **r'\bb\w+'** to match words starting with 'b'. Print the resulting list.
starter_code:
# Import the re module
# Define the string
# Use re.findall() with the pattern r'\bb\w+'
# Print the result

code_requirements.fail_message: Import the re module with 'import re' or 'from re import ...'.

code_requirements.description: Calls a method from the re module (like re.findall())
code_requirements.fail_message: Use a re method like re.findall() to perform the pattern matching.

hints: Use re.findall(r'\bb\w+', text) to find all words starting with 'b'
The \b ensures you match word boundaries so 'blueberry' is found but not 'crabapple'
Pass the result directly to print()
